risks.why_it_matters: Coding GUIs and launchers before requirements stabilize can create rework.
risks.mitigation: Keep this package PRECODE_BASELINE; product code waits for readiness gate.

risks.why_it_matters: Users may trust stubs as working security or onboarding tools.
risks.mitigation: Audit for overclaiming; mark this package as no product implementation scope.

risks.why_it_matters: Windows extraction and tooling can fail with long names.
risks.mitigation: Short package root, short filenames, automated path audit.

risks.why_it_matters: Docs, registries, or tools could be omitted.
risks.mitigation: Manifest, tree report, hash manifest, and package audit before zip.

risks.why_it_matters: Docs, registries, and requirements can disagree.
risks.mitigation: Registry sync and traceability audits.

risks.why_it_matters: Two deployments may evolve into incompatible systems.
risks.mitigation: One policy/config engine with different presets.

risks.why_it_matters: Users could accidentally publish files or identity.
risks.mitigation: Private/local-only/invisible/no-sharing defaults.

risks.why_it_matters: Hidden controls do not enforce access control.
risks.mitigation: Backend policy enforcement required by specification.

risks.why_it_matters: Users may not understand who can see or do what.
risks.mitigation: Policy simulator, plain-language labels, novice/advanced modes.

risks.why_it_matters: Schools or communities could expose inappropriate content.
risks.mitigation: Review states and explicit publishing rules.

risks.why_it_matters: Moved or duplicated files can break trust.
risks.mitigation: Stable IDs, content hashes, provenance, snapshots.

risks.why_it_matters: Tags and permissions may be lost when files move.
risks.mitigation: Central registry and exportable snapshots.

risks.why_it_matters: Bad settings can expose data or lock users out.
risks.mitigation: Snapshot before apply, rollback plan, audit entry.

risks.why_it_matters: Logs can become unusable.
risks.mitigation: Controlled event types and required audit fields.

risks.why_it_matters: Support bundles can leak private paths or identities.
risks.mitigation: Redaction levels and inclusion manifest.

risks.why_it_matters: True mesh behavior is hardware- and transport-dependent.
risks.mitigation: Separate LAN, peer, replication, gateway, and mesh terms.

risks.why_it_matters: A core that assumes one device type limits adoption.
risks.mitigation: Node roles and adapter abstraction.

risks.why_it_matters: Users may fail before setup starts.
risks.mitigation: Install Check, offline installer guidance, eventual bundled runtime option.

risks.why_it_matters: Clickable launchers can fail after unzip.
risks.mitigation: Relative launchers and launcher repair tool requirement.

risks.why_it_matters: Powerful configuration can intimidate or mislead users.
risks.mitigation: Mode separation and guided first-run flows.

risks.why_it_matters: Internet bridging changes the trust boundary.
risks.mitigation: Disabled by default, warning, audit, dedicated gateway boundary tool.

risks.why_it_matters: Cached data may be hard to retract.
risks.mitigation: Dry-run replication plans and trust-aware cache policy.

risks.why_it_matters: Delete from cache, registry, or community are different.
risks.mitigation: Controlled deletion types and confirmation language.

risks.why_it_matters: Review decisions need reasons and traceability.
risks.mitigation: Reason codes, actor IDs, timestamps, and appeal hooks.

risks.why_it_matters: Local systems need practical recovery.
risks.mitigation: Recovery artifact and restore flow requirements.

risks.why_it_matters: Names, paths, metadata, and imports can break tools or create unsafe rendering.
risks.mitigation: Length limits, character allowlists, path normalization, safe rendering.

risks.why_it_matters: Portal could expose arbitrary local files.
risks.mitigation: Serve only registered approved content from controlled roots.

risks.why_it_matters: Registry builder may index too much.
risks.mitigation: Explicit folder selection, preview, exclude patterns, confirmation.

risks.why_it_matters: Old PCs, Pis, and school machines may struggle.
risks.mitigation: Lightweight core, incremental indexing, no heavy base dependencies.

risks.why_it_matters: A local-first system loses value if cloud dependency remains.
risks.mitigation: Offline-first tests and optional external integrations.

risks.why_it_matters: Package updates could destroy runtime configuration.
risks.mitigation: Separate source from runtime, backup before migration.

risks.why_it_matters: Private logs or identities may leak.
risks.mitigation: runtime excluded by gitignore and audit scan.

risks.why_it_matters: Validation work can become unbounded.
risks.mitigation: Sprint-specific test plan tied to claims.

risks.why_it_matters: Coding may start too early.
risks.mitigation: PRECODE_READY gate with debt register.

risks.why_it_matters: Schools, libraries, and neighborhoods have different duties.
risks.mitigation: Deployment owner responsibility and policy hooks.

risks.why_it_matters: The project can try to become too many systems at once.
risks.mitigation: Scope register and staged milestones.
